headline: Got $1,000? 1 Unstoppable Cybersecurity Pioneer to Buy Hand Over Fist and Never Sell
summary: CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD) is a stock worth owning for decades because cybersecurity has quietly become a non-negotiable utility, and the Falcon platform now sits at the center of how the world’s largest enterprises secure both their existing infrastructure and the new wave of AI workloads that businesses cannot switch off even during a downturn. headline: CrowdStrike, AWS race to fix AI security blind spot
summary: CrowdStrike (CRWD) and Amazon Web Services are racing to close a security gap that most enterprises do not yet know they have. Companies are deploying AI agents into production faster than their security teams can monitor what those agents actually do once live. That mismatch, not the partnership ...
